summary: Digest Email Subscription feature fully verified. Fixed route ordering bug (GET /api/digest/subscribers was being caught by /{digest_id} wildcard). All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend subscription form works with confirmation UI.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/digest/subscriber-count returns active subscriber count (public endpoint)
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/subscribe - new email subscribes successfully
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/subscribe - duplicate email returns 'Already subscribed'
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/subscribe - invalid email returns 400
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/subscribe - empty email returns 400
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/unsubscribe - deactivates subscription
BACKEND: POST /api/digest/unsubscribe - nonexistent email returns unsubscribed=false
BACKEND: Re-subscribe after unsubscribe works
BACKEND: GET /api/digest/subscribers - requires authentication (401 without token)
BACKEND: GET /api/digest/subscribers - admin access returns active_count, total_count, recent list
SSE FIX: NotificationCenter.jsx uses 'trendscout_token' key at line 204
TASK: generate_weekly_digest registered in TaskRegistry with cron '0 9 * * 1' (Monday 9am UTC)
REDIS: push_event() has Redis pub/sub with fallback to in-memory queue
FRONTEND: /weekly-digest page loads with DigestSubscribeForm component
FRONTEND: 'Get this in your inbox every Monday' text displayed
FRONTEND: Email input field present with data-testid='subscribe-email-input'
FRONTEND: Subscribe button present with data-testid='subscribe-btn'
FRONTEND: After subscription, confirmation shows 'You're subscribed!' with checkmark
FRONTEND: Toast notification appears: 'Subscribed! You'll get the weekly digest every Monday.'
FRONTEND: /trending page has 'Weekly Digest' link in nav bar (top-right)

verified_features.verification: Email input, subscribe button, social proof count, confirmation UI all working
New emails subscribe, duplicates handled with 'Already subscribed', re-subscribe after unsubscribe works
Deactivates subscription, nonexistent emails return unsubscribed=false
Returns {count: int} for social proof, no auth required
Returns active_count, total_count, recent subscribers. Requires admin auth.
Task registered in TaskRegistry with correct schedule
push_event() tries Redis pub/sub first, falls back to in-memory _event_queues
'Weekly Digest' link visible in top-right nav, links to /weekly-digest

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Route ordering issue - /subscribers defined AFTER /{digest_id} wildcard, causing 'subscribers' to be captured as digest_id parameter

seed_data_creation: Test subscribers created during testing (test_subscriber_* and test_ui_* emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Digest subscription feature complete: (1) /weekly-digest shows subscription form with email input, subscribe button, social proof counter. (2) POST /api/digest/subscribe is public, handles new/duplicate/resubscribe cases. (3) POST /api/digest/unsubscribe is public. (4) GET /api/digest/subscriber-count is public for social proof. (5) GET /api/digest/subscribers requires admin auth. (6) Route order fixed: /subscribers now defined BEFORE /{digest_id}. (7) SSE uses 'trendscout_token' localStorage key. (8) generate_weekly_digest task scheduled for Monday 9am UTC.
